/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/clang++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/llama-tts.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/llama-tts.dir/tts.cpp.o" -o ../../bin/llama-tts  ../../src/libllama.a ../../common/libcommon.a -lpthread ../../src/libllama.a ../../ggml/src/libggml.a ../../ggml/src/libggml-cpu.a ../../ggml/src/libggml-base.a -pthread -ldl /data/data/com.termux/files/usr/lib/libomp.a ../../vendor/cpp-httplib/libcpp-httplib.a /data/data/com.termux/files/usr/lib/libssl.so /data/data/com.termux/files/usr/lib/libcrypto.so -lpthread
